description: Create a complex Linux build GitHub Actions workflow that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs: 'build' and 'clang-tidy'. The 'build' job uses a matrix strategy to run multiple builds with different configurations, including various C++ compilers, standards, and build types. It checks out the code, prepares the environment, configures the build with CMake, and runs tests. The 'clang-tidy' job also uses a matrix strategy to run clang-tidy on the code with different configurations.
